title: Syngonanthus niveus
taxonomy: Syngonanthus niveus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Vochysiaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly found in the Americas. This family is part of the larger order Myrtales, which includes a wide range of flowering plants. Syngonanthus niveus is further classified as a member of the genus Syngonanthus, which consists of a group of plants native to South America. The species niveus is the specific epithet, which is used to distinguish this particular species from others within the same genus. Further classification includes its kingdom, which is Plantae, and its phylum and class, which are both associated with flowering plants.
